blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: He was asking about you. To some guys by the corner store. I wasn't gonna say anything but — he was asking specific things. Like where you walk home. What time.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: Yesterday. I don't know who those guys were. But they weren't from school.
Daniel asking about my route home. Getting outside help. This wasn't just hallway stuff anymore.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: I'm just saying. Watch yourself this week.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: You know where I am if something goes sideways.
He was thirteen. He said it like it was nothing. I didn't know whether to feel better or worse about that.
